The '''Model Fac H-121''' was a factory model, designed by [[Delvin Constructs/Legends|Delvin Constructs]], that was used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. While able to be tooled for the production of several vehicle types, the Empire most often produced the [[Self-Propelled Medium Artillery]] and [[2-M Saber-class repulsor tank/Legends|2-M ''Saber''-class repulsor tank]] at these facilities. The Empire also attempted to use these facilities for constructing [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] as well, but it was found the H-121 was too small and could not provide adequate attention for the advanced design.
